race.comment: COMMON INTEREST (17) only got going late and closed off well into a midfield finish behind a handy one. He'll have come on from that, gets a key switch to Toeroek, and should relish the rise in trip. Bold showing expected. MRS SECOMBE (11) was stiff to miss the bob second up on the Parks track. She's fitter and draws a dream. No reason she can't go one better. SHADOW EAGLE (2) hasn't won for a while but he's knocking on the door and should blend into it nicely from his middle draw. SASSY FOR SURE (13) has been frustrating but the blinkers may help her put it together. She'll need a smart steer from Neindorf out there though.
